overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, showing the player character walking through a dense, vertical urban slum with metal catwalks, rusted staircases, and neon signs. The scene transitions from a dark interior to a sunlit, bustling exterior with steam vents, hanging laundry, and various NPCs going about their activities.

events.description: door opens revealing bright sunlight from exterior
transition from dark interior to bright outdoor metal catwalk

agents.ego_description: standing in dark room then opening door to exit into bright exterior

entered.detail: illuminated poster on corrugated metal wall showing figure with text
vertical ribbed metal sheets forming interior walls
sliding metal door with handle that opens to exterior
grated metal walkway with yellow railings visible through opening door

segments.scene_description: The clip begins in a dimly lit interior space with corrugated metal walls and a movie poster. The player opens a sliding metal door, causing a dramatic lighting change as bright sunlight floods in, revealing a metal catwalk outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical slum with stacked metal walkways and staircases

events.description: begins ascending rusted metal staircase with yellow railings

agents.ego_description: walking forward and ascending multiple flights of metal stairs through a crowded vertical settlement

notable_agents.action: NPC in green jacket walking up stairs ahead of player

entered.detail: steep metal stairs with yellow safety railings showing signs of rust and wear
painted metal railings lining the walkways and stairs
colorful clothes and fabrics draped on lines between structures
illuminated signage with cyan and pink lighting on distant buildings
makeshift structures built from sheet metal stacked vertically

segments.scene_description: The player steps out onto a metal catwalk in a dense vertical slum, ascending rusted staircases past hanging laundry and corrugated metal shacks. The area is bustling with NPCs walking in opposing directions, and neon signs are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level walkways with hanging garments and close-quarters housing

events.description: passing from open stairwell into covered walkway with food vendors

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb stairs while passing NPCs and navigating narrow walkways with laundry overhead

notable_agents.action: man in plaid shirt and bandana descending stairs toward player

entered.detail: small wooden vendor stand with green awning and people gathered
pipes releasing white steam into the air between buildings
tall modern glass and steel towers visible in the background contrast with the slum

segments.scene_description: The player continues ascending through narrow walkways lined with corrugated metal shacks and hanging laundry. Steam vents release vapor between the structures, and distant skyscrapers become visible. The segment ends as the player approaches a food stall kiosk.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with food vendors and graffiti-covered walls

events.description: moving from sunlit area into shadowed narrow passage between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking past a food stall and through a narrow alley with graffiti-covered walls

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food kiosk with another NPC nearby

entered.detail: close vertical walls of adjacent buildings creating a tight corridor
green and yellow painted walls covered in spray paint and street art

segments.scene_description: The player walks past a food stall kiosk and enters a narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural and shadow as the player moves through the enclosed passage between corrugated metal structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking construction site and city vista

events.description: emerging from narrow alley onto open elevated platform with city view
turning right to descend stairs toward lower level with outdoor gym

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkways, pausing to overlook the cityscape, then turning toward stairs

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near the railing overlooking the city

entered.detail: metal framework and temporary structures surrounding a building under construction
weightlifting benches and barbells set up in an open area

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow alley onto an open elevated walkway with views of distant skyscrapers and construction scaffolding. Steam rises from vents as the player walks past a seated NPC and turns toward an outdoor gym area with weightlifting equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level industrial walkway with steam pipes and metal structures

events.description: descending metal stairs and turning left along lower catwalk

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs and along lower level walkways past industrial piping and steam vents

entered.detail: large metal pipes and ductwork running along the walkway walls

segments.scene_description: The player descends to a lower level industrial walkway characterized by large metal pipes, steam vents, and corrugated metal shacks. The area is less crowded, with graffiti visible on the walls and distant skyscrapers still visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air gym area and final walkway leading to market stalls

events.description: passing through outdoor gym area with people lifting weights

agents.ego_description: walking past an outdoor gym where NPCs are working out, then continuing toward a bridge with market stalls

notable_agents.action: muscular man lifting weights at outdoor gym station
person sitting on weight bench adjusting equipment

entered.detail: exercise bench with weights and padding where NPCs are training
covered vendor booths visible at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an outdoor gym area where NPCs are actively lifting weights and exercising. Continuing forward, the player approaches a bridge with yellow railings leading toward distant market stalls, with the dense urban architecture of the slum surrounding the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dim, enclosed interior into the sprawling, sun-drenched verticality of a dense urban slum. It begins inside a room with corrugated metal walls before a sliding door opens, flooding the scene with bright sunlight as the camera steps onto a metal catwalk. The path ascends through rusted staircases and narrow walkways lined with hanging laundry and steam vents, passing bustling NPCs and neon signs before dipping into a graffiti-covered alleyway. As the camera emerges from the shadows onto an open elevated walkway, the view expands to reveal distant skyscrapers and construction scaffolding, eventually descending through an industrial zone of large metal pipes. The movement finally leads through an outdoor gym where NPCs exercise, ending as the camera approaches a yellow-railed bridge that opens toward distant market stalls.
